title: RapidMeta Oncology | Capivasertib + Fulvestrant in HR+/HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer v1.0
hero_h2: Capivasertib + Fulvestrant After CDK4/6i in HR+ HER2- Advanced Breast Cancer

pico.pop: Adults with HR+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression after aromatase inhibitor therapy with or without prior CDK4/6 inhibitor
pico.int: Capivasertib 400 mg orally twice daily (4 days on, 3 days off) + fulvestrant 500 mg IM (AKT inhibitor combination)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival in overall population and AKT-pathway-altered (PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN) subpopulation
pico.subgroup: AKT-pathway alteration status, prior CDK4/6 inhibitor, presence of liver metastases, geographic region

real_data_entries.name: CAPItello-291
real_data_entries.group: HR+/HER2- advanced BC post-AI +/- CDK4/6i, capivasertib + fulvestrant vs placebo + fulvestrant (PFS primary in overall + AKT-altered cohorts)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary, overall population; HR vs placebo + fulvestrant)
Progression-free survival in AKT-pathway-altered (PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN) subpopulation (HR; primary)
Confirmed objective response rate in measurable disease (RR vs placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Turner NC et al. N Engl J Med 2023;388:2058-2070 (CAPItello-291).
